messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a ManufacturingLot aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve using discriminated unions. Throw DomainError when releasing an already scrapped lot.
Write an event-sourced Decider for a ProductionLine aggregate. Constraints: strict types, no any, exhaustive never default, typed DomainError, reject starting a decommissioned line.
Implement a Decider for a QualityBatch aggregate with sample, approve, reject transitions. Rejecting an approved batch must throw a typed error. Include an exhaustive evolve.
Build a pure Decider for an AssemblyRun aggregate. Commands: schedule, start, complete, abort. Starting a completed run must throw.
Write a Decider for a ToolingRequest aggregate with submit, approve, fulfill, reject transitions. Fulfilling a rejected request must throw a DomainError.
Implement an event-sourced Decider for a YieldReport aggregate. Transitions: draft, finalize, amend. Finalizing an empty draft must throw.
Build a projection that maintains a ReworkOrder status view keyed by order id. Events: ReworkOrderOpened, ReworkOrderAssigned, ReworkOrderClosed. Include emptyView and a pure project function.
Write a projection that tallies CalibrationLog events into a per-instrument counter. Events to handle: CalibrationPerformed, CalibrationFailed. Ignore unrelated events. Include an emptyView literal.

Show a projection that tracks the currently-active ShopFloorShift per station. Events: ShiftOpened, ShiftClosed. Use project(view, event) and return the view unchanged for events outside its interest.
Build a BOMRevision projection keyed by revisionId that records who authored each revision and when it was published. Handle events BOMRevisionDrafted and BOMRevisionPublished; ignore others.
Explain briefly how a versioned Snapshot upgrade pipeline works for a ManufacturingLot, then implement it with CURRENT_VERSION, upgraders v1->v2 and v2->v3, and a loader that chains them.
Build a Snapshot<ProductionLineState> pipeline with CURRENT_VERSION=3, upgraders v1->v2 and v2->v3, and a loader that runs them in order, asserting the final payload matches CurrentState.
Write a versioned Snapshot loader for a QualityBatch. Constraints: v1 had only id, v2 added samples, v3 added supervisor. Include CURRENT_VERSION constant and chained upgraders.

Build an optimistic-concurrency append path for an AssemblyRun stream. Use a local EventStore interface with expectedRevision: bigint | "no_stream" | "any", and translate a conflict signal into a typed ConcurrencyConflict error.
Write an optimistic-concurrency guarded write for a ToolingRequest stream. Read current revision, then appendToStream with expectedRevision and surface a ConcurrencyConflict on mismatch.
Add optimistic concurrency to a DefectTicket append path. The EventStore.appendToStream returns either success or a WrongExpectedVersion signal — convert the latter to a typed ConcurrencyConflict.
Build a CommandHandler for ManufacturingLot: load events via readStream, reduce through evolve into state, call decide(command, state), then appendToStream with expectedRevision.
Write a CommandHandler for ProductionLine commands. Load the stream, fold to state, call decide, then appendToStream with expectedRevision. Keep business logic in decide, orchestration in handle.
Wrap an AssemblyRun CommandHandler in Effect.gen. The effect should readStream, fold via evolve, call decide, and appendToStream. Keep evolve and decide pure and outside the effect.
Build a CommandHandler for a ReworkOrder that uses appendToStream with expectedRevision and surfaces a ConcurrencyConflict on revision mismatch.
What's the v5 way to resume a projection subscription from a saved checkpoint after a restart? Show a minimal example for a YieldReport projection.
How do I build a crash-safe QualityBatch subscription runner? Show a minimal checkpointed loop where the checkpoint is written AFTER the view persists.
Build a BOMRevision subscription that persists a projection view and commits the checkpoint after each event. Use a local EventStore and CheckpointStore interface.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper that folds an AsyncIterable of events into aggregate state, and use it with ManufacturingLot events. Typed, no any, with a for-await loop.
Explain how a when()-based aggregateStream replays a ProductionLine stream, then implement both helpers with a typed async iterable.
Write a when reducer for CalibrationLog events and a generic aggregateStream<S, E> that folds them. Exhaustive switch with never default.
Build a ShopFloorShift when reducer plus a generic aggregateStream that can replay a live subscription into state. Strict types, pure reducer, typed initial.

Implement an upcast function for stored DefectTicket events. v1 stored { type: 'DefectReported', data: { defect: string } }; the current schema uses { type: 'DefectReported', data: { defect: string; severity: 'low' } }. Unknown versions must throw UnknownEventError.

Write an upcast for ToolingRequest events. Old v1 used { type: 'RequestSubmitted', data: { item: string } }; v2 renamed 'item' to 'tool'. Current shape is v2. Throw UnknownEventError on unrecognised envelopes.
Explain briefly how a read-model rebuild works, then implement one for a YieldReport view. Batched reads, resumable from a given position, persisted per batch.
Build a resumable rebuild loop for a ReworkOrder read model. Constraints: batched reads, a from cursor, progress reported through a callback, persist per batch.

Show a minimal CQRS split for a QualityBatch. handleCommand writes through a Decider and appendToStream; queryView reads from a read store. Add a comment noting the read store is eventually consistent.
Implement a CQRS boundary for AssemblyRun. Constraints: no shared state type between sides, an EventStore for writes, a read projection for queries. Include a Decider interface on the write side.
Build a process manager that reacts to a ToolingRequest approval by dispatching a CalibrationLog request. Pure react(event) returning Command | null, with a 2-step saga.
Write a saga skeleton that bridges a ManufacturingLot release to a QualityBatch start command. Pure react function, returns null for unrelated events.
Translate ReworkOrder domain events into integration events. Pure translate(event): IntegrationEvent | null. Versioned schema field. At least one domain event maps to null.
Build an outbox append function for BOMRevision. Constraints: one transactional unit inserts outbox rows and calls appendToStream; a publisher (described in a comment) polls and marks rows published.
Wrap a QualityBatch append path in Effect.gen. The effect reads the current revision, runs decide, and calls appendToStream with expectedRevision. Keep decide pure.
Add an Effect-wrapped readStream helper that folds a YieldReport stream through when into state. Strict types, typed initial, no any.
Add an Effect.gen-wrapped projection runner for a CalibrationLog stream that persists after each event and writes the checkpoint afterwards.
